name: Dev Reference, Egress
description: Minimal worked example of the network-egress contract. Declares one allowed host in the manifest (network:api.github.com) and fetches GitHub's /zen endpoint (no auth, no API key, just a single-line quote). Demonstrates: how the requires block is written, how the host enforces it at runtime, and what happens on the unhappy path when a widget reaches for an undeclared host (set the demo option to flip the request URL and watch the cell surface a CapabilityDenied error instead of a network round-trip).

cell_options.name: demo_url
cell_options.label: Demo URL

choices.label: Undeclared host (httpbin.org)  - blocked by the gate

cell_options.help: Pick which URL the widget hits. The manifest only declares network:api.github.com, so the second option exercises the unhappy path: the socket hook raises CapabilityDenied, the widget surfaces it as a cell-level error, and the rest of the page keeps rendering.
